summary: Successfully tested Orders page Student Payments tab enhancements. All new features verified: Receivables summary card (₹55,013), Payment From column, Payment Mode column, View modal with full payment details, Delete confirmation modal with warning message. Backend DELETE endpoint and frontend UI all working correctly.

issues: Minor: Missing `aria-describedby` for DialogContent accessibility (console warning)

critical_code_review_comments: Receivables card correctly calculates ₹55,013 in pending payments
Payment From column shows Individual/School with appropriate icons (User/Building2)
Payment Mode column shows Online/Cash/N/A with appropriate icons (CreditCard/BanknoteIcon/Wallet)
View modal displays all required fields: Student name, phone, email, batch, amount, status, payment from, payment mode
Delete modal shows confirmation with payment details and warning message
DELETE /api/orders/student-payments/{payment_id} endpoint properly handles both student_payments collection and student_inquiries embedded payments
seed_data_creation: Used existing payment data - Trillion Daga (₹10,000), Shrey payments (₹5,000 each)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Student Payments tab enhancements fully tested. Features verified: 1) Receivables summary card showing ₹55,013, 2) Payment From column with Individual/School indicators, 3) Payment Mode column with Online/Cash/N/A indicators, 4) View modal with full payment details including new fields, 5) Delete confirmation modal with warning. Backend DELETE endpoint at /api/orders/student-payments/{payment_id} working correctly.

receivables_card.details: Shows ₹55,013 in pending receivables, correctly calculated from payments with status !== 'paid'

payment_from_column.details: Shows 'Individual' or 'School' with User/Building2 icons in blue/orange colors

view_modal.details: Opens via eye icon, displays: Student name, Parent/Guardian, Phone, Email, Batch, Amount, Status, Payment From, Payment Mode. Has close button

delete_modal.details: Opens via trash icon, shows confirmation with Student name, Amount, Status. Has warning message and Cancel/Delete buttons

delete_endpoint.details: Returns 401 without auth, 404 for non-existent IDs. Handles both student_payments collection and student_inquiries payments
